report: Phase 18 — Programmatic SEO Quality Upgrade Engine — Complete
status: ENGINE BUILT — READY FOR DAILY USE
core_principle: IMPROVE_EXISTING_PAGE > CREATE_NEW_PAGE. Goal: make existing pages indexable, not create more pages.

dry_run_results.note: All 13 UPGRADE_NOW are discovered-not-indexed guides — Phase 16.12G fixes already deployed to address this.

first_controlled_execution.reason: Phase 16.12G (guide title + Article schema) already deployed the key upgrade. Phase 18 is the analytical engine that identifies what needs upgrading.

integration_with_phase_17.flow: Phase 17 finds demand → Phase 18 matches to pages → combined scoring → upgrade decision → auditor → execute → deploy → measure

gsc_coverage_insight.insight: 499/649 pages have no GSC inspection data — most are Tier 2/3 tools that Google hasn't discovered. The 55 discovered-not-indexed are primarily guides that need upgrade.

biggest_blocker: Most programmatic pages (499/649) have no GSC data — Google hasn't discovered them. Internal linking from indexed pages is the primary solution. Upgrade modules will improve quality when Google does crawl them.
next_steps: Phase 15 daily workflow: apply internal links from indexed pages to discovered guides
Phase 17 daily workflow: execute CTR fixes on blogs with 0 clicks
Review 225 consolidation tools individually — do NOT mass-action
Monitor GSC in 14 days for Phase 16.12G impact on guide indexation
Rerun Phase 18 inventory weekly to track coverage state changes
